caption: TABLE 1 Statistics of the scene graph dataset. ”-” indicates that this attribute is not released, and $" \mathbf { \nabla } \mathbf { x } \cdot \mathbf { \nabla }$ indicates that the attribute is not applicable.

TABLE 2 Performance comparison of the SGG method with graph constraints on VG150. [31]. ’-’ indicates that there is no corresponding result released in the paper. Note that some methods use multiple different types of networks or priors, and these are categorized according to the most prominent method they use. $^ \dagger$ denotes the re-implemented version from [68]. \* indicates that the method evaluates on other datasets. The best performance is shown in bold.
